title: FINIS ACTUS
description:
FINIS ACTUS is a psychological horror experience set in the dark streets of 1891 London. Crafted with the passion of a solo developer, step into a nightmare that pushes the boundaries of reality.

THE GREATEST ILLUSION IS THE ONE YOU BELIEVE

 FINIS ACTUS is a first-person psychological thriller set in the gloomy shadows of 1891 London. Inside the magnificent yet haunting mansion of a famous illusionist, the line between reality and deception blurs with every step.

THE TRAGEDY OF THE WADSWORTH FAMILY
 
Abandoned after a tragic event years ago, this mansion now calls you into its silent corridors. Unravel the unfinished story of the Wadsworth Family by following clues hidden within the walls and the sorrow embedded in every room. But remember: every secret has its price.

KEY FEATURES

• Victorian Atmosphere: Experience the heavy, foggy, and eerie ambiance of 19th-century London with meticulously crafted environments.

• Environmental Storytelling: The narrative unfolds through every dusty letter, hidden object, and the memories trapped within the manor.

• Psychological Depth: A plot focused on the unknown and the feeling of being watched, rather than traditional jump scares.

• Mind-Bending Puzzles: Solve complex, story-driven puzzles designed by a master of illusion.

Are you ready to witness the final act before the curtain falls for good?
description_short: 1891 London. In the mansion of a famous illusionist, the connection between reality and madness is severed. Many who trusted their intellect have been lost in these corridors. Before the curtain falls, will you see beyond the illusion, or will you become part of this tragedy?
